success_criteria: gemini CLI is detected and version is recorded.
run-validator-b live execution is attempted with a fresh Validator-B handoff.
Validator-B result artifact is produced and parses as Validator-B / Gemini CLI result, or a Resource Failure is recorded with clear cause.
If parser changes are required, node --check and audit:harness pass.
Validator-A validation passes before main merge.
known_risks: Gemini CLI live smoke required multiple wrapper transport adjustments.
Validator-A may not execute node/npm directly inside its own sandbox; validation-evidence.json records parent-session command results.
forbidden_context: Do not include secrets, credentials, API keys, tokens, or PII.
Do not merge main from this validation step.
Do not treat Gemini auth/quota/rate/context failures as Validator-B FAIL.
